case_title: RICK QURESHI VS. DAIMLER NORTH AMERICA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY QURESHI, RICK AS TO DEFENDANT DAIMLER NORTH AMERICA CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF QURESHI, RICK
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF QURESHI, RICK AS TO DEFENDANT DAIMLER NORTH AMERICA CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-13-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DAIMLER NORTH AMERICA CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-26-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-26-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DAIMLER NORTH AMERICA CORPORATION
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY QURESHI, RICK DAIMLER NORTH AMERICA CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-26-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QURESHI, RICK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DAIMLER NORTH AMERICA CORPORATION THE STATUTE OF LIMITATION FOR BREACH OF WARRANTY UNDER THE SONG-BEVERLY ACT IS GOVERNED BY COMMERCIAL CODE 2725 WHICH GOVERNS THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS FOR WARRANTIES UNDER THE UNIFORM COMMERCIAL CODE. THAT STATUE PROVIDES FOR A 4 YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATION. PLAINITFF BOUGHT HIS CAR ON 12-1-2002 & THE WARRANTY EXPIRED ON 12-1-2006 BUT PLAINTIFF DID NOT FILE HIS COMPLAINT UNTIL 6.8.2012. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
